message:
fix(session-types): split Send+static bounds off sync methods, fix misleading docs

Fresh-eyes review found:
- BUG: sync send()/recv() methods inherited unnecessary T: Send + 'static
  bounds from the async send_async/recv_async impl block. Split into
  separate impl blocks so pure-typestate users can pass non-Send types.
- Removed dead SessionMessage enum that was never used (transport uses
  Box<dyn Any + Send> with downcasting, not typed discriminants).
- Updated TransportBridgeContract doc to accurately describe the wire
  format and architecture instead of referencing SessionMessage.
- Renamed new_transport_pair type params from I/R to IS/RS to avoid
  confusion with Initiator/Responder role types.
- Removed dangling payload_to_string import in h1/listener.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
